title: Implement functionality to enforce the restrict option in: DROP SCHEMA xyz RESTRICT;
poc: CREATE TABLE xyz.t1 (col1 int Primary Key);
SELECT col1 FROM xyz.t1 WHERE col1 > 0 ORDER BY col1;
key_bug_features: Enforce restrict option in DROP SCHEMA command
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE xyz.t1 (col1 int PRIMARY KEY, col2 varchar(50) NOT NULL);
SELECT col1, col2 FROM xyz.t1 WHERE col1 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY col1;
